name: Annie Mae Jones' Coconut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in yolks, then stir in buttermilk, salt, baking powder, and lemon rind.
4. Sift flour over the wet mixture and blend well with an electric mixer on low speed.
5. Divide batter between two greased 8-inch cake pans.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cakes to cool in pans for 10 minutes before turning off the oven and removing from pans.
8. Frost with your favorite coconut frosting or whipped cream.
